modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to rename a Google Sheet as intended.

full_description_text: The user is trying to rename a Google Sheet but is encountering difficulties. They are unsure of the steps required to complete this action. This issue is affecting their ability to organize their documents effectively.
short_description: Unable to rename a Google Sheet as intended.
description: The user is trying to rename a Google Sheet but is encountering difficulties. They are unsure of the steps required to complete this action. This issue is affecting their ability to organize their documents effectively.
